positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a forest creature—a mystical fox spirit with glowing, ethereal tail and elegant, flowing fur. The fox is posed sitting majestically amidst bioluminescent flora and giant, smooth, geometric leaves. The background is a dark, enchanted forest at twilight, rendered with strong contrast and deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, violet). Use a clean, high-contrast linework style with pops of glowing color, like sophisticated stained-glass art meets Japanese woodblock printing. The composition is centered and symmetrical, perfect for a t-shirt print. Overhead, a crescent moon shines, illuminating scattered glowing spores. Vector graphic quality, intricate detail, flat planes of color, cinematic lighting, apparel print, seamless pattern elements.
